content.speakerText: Let’s wrap this up — final terms: $52/unit, 12K units, 20% deposit, monthly delivery, 24-month contract.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们来收尾吧——最终条款：单价52美元，1.2万件，20%定金，每月交货，24个月合同。
expectedAnswers: Confirmed. I’ll send the signed contract by 5 PM today and confirm the first delivery date with logistics.
Sounds good. We’re excited about this partnership and will prepare our production schedule accordingly.
Agreed. Thank you for your clarity and collaboration — we’ll keep you updated on our progress.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确表示接受最终条款，无模糊或保留意见
是否使用场景关键词（contract, deposit, delivery, partnership）
是否体现专业、积极、有行动力的语气，符合商业沟通规范

content.scenarioHint: 你和供应商刚刚谈妥合作细节，现在你需要主动确认条款并表达对未来合作的期待，以巩固关系。
content.speakerText: Just to make sure we’re aligned: $45 per unit, 15,000 units total, 25% deposit, quarterly deliveries, and a one-year renewable contract?
content.speakerTextCn: 为了确保我们达成一致：单价45美元，总共15000件，25%定金，季度交货，一年期可续约合同？
expectedAnswers: Perfect — that’s exactly what we agreed on. I’ll email the contract by tomorrow afternoon and we can set up the first delivery for next month.
Sounds great! Your team has been a pleasure to work with — I’m already looking forward to the next order.
Agreed! Let’s keep this momentum going — I’ll schedule a quick call next week to finalize logistics.
Yes, that’s right. Thanks for being flexible — this is the start of a strong partnership.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰确认了所有关键条款（价格、数量、付款、交货、合同期限）
语言准确性：语法、时态和专业术语使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合商务英语口语习惯，语气得体
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'aligned', 'contract', 'delivery', 'partnership' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 在结束一次成功的商务谈判后，你想主动表达对合作的期待，并用具体细节赞美对方团队，以建立长期关系。
content.speakerText: I really appreciate how smoothly this came together — your responsiveness and attention to detail made all the difference.
content.speakerTextCn: 我非常感谢这次合作如此顺利，你们的及时响应和细致入微让一切变得不同。
expectedAnswers: Thank you — we’re equally impressed with your professionalism. Let’s aim to make this the first of many collaborations.
Absolutely — your team’s clarity and speed set a new standard for us. I’d love to explore expanding the scope next quarter.
Same here! The way you handled the revisions showed real commitment. We’re excited to grow with you.
Couldn’t agree more. We’ll definitely recommend you to our network — this partnership feels like a win-win.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了对合作的期待并强化了关系
语言准确性：是否正确使用了表达感激和展望的结构（e.g., 'look forward to', 'hope to', 'excited to'）
表达自然度：是否避免了空洞赞美，使用了具体、真实的细节
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'collaboration', 'professionalism', 'partnership', 'expand' 等场景关键词
